description_long: This is an adult male figure with a rugged appearance, wearing a loose, short-sleeved t-shirt that appears slightly dirty and worn. He is dressed in fitted, slightly wrinkled pants that show some signs of wear, and sturdy ankle-high boots. His arms are extended slightly outward, and his hands are open, with visible details such as veins and knuckles. The figure's hair is short and unkempt, with a tousled, spiky style. The overall look suggests a casual, possibly working-class individual who might be found in urban environments such as streets, garages, or parks.
description: A rugged adult male in a worn t-shirt, fitted pants, and boots, with a casual, slightly disheveled appearance.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full face, chest, and open hands, highlighting the t-shirt and overall stance.
description_view_1: Left side view emphasizes the profile of the face, arm, and the side seam of the pants and boots.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the head, shirt, and pants, with arms slightly out to the sides.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the profile and the back of the boots and arm.
attribute_clothing_type: casual t-shirt and fitted pants with sturdy boots
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms slightly extended
